name: The Toronto-Dominion Bank
description: The Toronto-Dominion Bank is a Canadian multinational banking and financial services corporation. Headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, the bank is commonly known as TD and operates as TD Bank Group. It is one of the largest banks in Canada by assets and market capitalization, serving over 27 million customers worldwide. TD operates through several key business segments, including Canadian Retail, U.S. Retail, and Wholesale Banking, offering a comprehensive suite of personal, commercial, and investment banking products and services.
